## What & why

## How was this tested?

<!-- e.g. "npm test passes; manually exercised the Pods page against a kind cluster with a
CrashLoopBackOff pod and confirmed the status label renders correctly." -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (type-check + bundle)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New logic has test coverage
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `doc/*.md`) if behavior, commands, or pages changed
- [ ] For UI changes: exercised the feature in a real browser against a cluster (not just tests)
